ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipts For The Blocked Accounts
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipts For The Blocked Accounts
Off Calendar Jul-05-2017 Continued To Jul-19-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Edwin James (Administrator).

Ms. Rasch stated that she has had a lot of problems with Chase Bank with respect to return of the second receipt for the blocked account, that she was told it was overnighted on Friday, that it has not arrived and that the tracking indicated that it will be delivered today. Status on filing of the receipts for the blocked accounts is continued to July 19, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Ms. Rasch that the closing escrow statement also needs to be filed.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipts For The Blocked Accounts
Off Calendar Jun-20-2017 Continued To Jul-05-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (180 Maddux Ave, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar May-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Edwin James.

The sale was confirmed at $835,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed April 4, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). All of the proceeds are to be deposited into blocked accounts in lieu of bond.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (180 Maddux Ave, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Apr-26-2017 Continued To May-09-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Edwin James (Administrator).

The Court informed Ms. Rasch that there is an issue with publication. Mr. Rasch stated that she faxed the notice to the newspaper company on January 3rd with instruction to publish on January 31st, and when looking over the notes she sees that it was delayed by one day. The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is continued to May 9, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, LIMITED APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with (petitioner) Edwin James. Tim Halloran for and with (petitioner) Woodrell James.

The Court stated that it has all of the nominations. Mr. Halloran stated that under the Probate Code the nomination are not conclusive of eligibility, that there is a conflict of interest in that Wendell James is living in the house rent free, that the person in Alabama is not a resident here and that the court investigation on the conservatee points out that the conservatee does not want Edwin James handling her affairs. Ms. Rasch stated that they e-filed a response but it had not posted, that her client is a retired federal agent of the Immigration and Customs Enforcement agency, that the accusations of Woodrell are not correct, that all of the family except Woodrell support Edwin's appointment and that he is only asking for limited authority with an appropriate bond. Mr. Halloran stated that the solicitation of support is only to demonstrate how popular he is and that his client was financially responsible for the decedent. Ms. Rasch stated that there was a Power of Attorney appointing Woodrell's wife, that they did not financially support the decedent, that an accounting was requested in the conservatorship but never provided and that in the conservatorship Woodrell had no support. Mr. Halloran stated that the court only needs to look at the investigator's report. The two petitions for letters of administration were taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Aquino. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
